title: Association between circulating microRNA-122, microRNA-126-3p and microRNA-146a and inflammatory markers
author: Hassan Mozaffari-Khosravi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bax5ifq6

steps.title: Real time PCR
steps.instruction: Real time PCR

steps.title: IL6 measurement by ELISA kit https://www
steps.instruction: IL6 measurement by ELISA kit https://www.diaclone.com/documents/protocole/950.030_Human_IL-6_ELISA_kit_insert_v11.pdf

steps.title: RNA extraction http://tribioscience
steps.instruction: RNA extraction http://tribioscience.com/files/315-150.pdf

steps.title: Prepare 750 ul RiboExTM LS in a 1
steps.instruction: Prepare 750 ul RiboExTM LS in a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube (not provided).

steps.title: Add 250 ul blood sample to the 1
steps.instruction: Add 250 ul blood sample to the 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube and vortex vigorously. If sample volume is 100 ul, sample should be adjusted to 250 ul with PBS or RNase-free water. Be sure to confirm the applicable minimum volume, which is 100 ul.

steps.title: Incubate 2 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate 2 min at room temperature. This step allows leukocytes to completely be collapsed.

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.2 ml of chloroform. Shake vigorously for 15 seconds and let it stand for 2 minutes at room temperature. Alternatively, 0.1 ml of BCP (1-bromo-3-chloropropane) can be used in place of chloroform.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 15 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 12,000 x g for 15 minutes at 4°C. The mixture will be separated into three phases; a lower layer, an interphase, and a colorless upper aqueous layer. The upper aqueous volume is about 450 ul. Centrifugation at temperatures >8°C may cause some DNA to partition in the aqueous phase.

steps.title: Read the absorbance value of each...
steps.instruction: Read the absorbance value of each well (immediately after step 5.11.) on a spectrophotometer using 450 nm as the primary wavelength and optionally 620 nm as the reference wave length (610 nm to 650 nm is acceptable).

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of H2SO4:Stop Reagent into all wells

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Incubate in the dark for 12-15 minutes* at room temperature. Avoid direct exposure to light by wrapping the plate in aluminium foil.

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of ready-to-use TMB Substrate Solution into all wells

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: Repeat wash step 5.5.

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Cover with a plastic plate cover and incubate at room temperature (18 to 25°C) for 30 min

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of Streptavidin-HRP solution into all wells

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: Remove the cover and wash the plate as follows: a) Aspirate the liquid from each well b) Dispense 0.3 ml of 1x wash buffer into each well c) Aspirate the contents of each well d) Repeat step b and c another two times

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Cover with a plastic plate cover and incubate at room temperature (18 to 25°C) for 3 hours

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 50l of diluted biotinylated anti-TNF to all wells

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100l of each Sample, Standard, Control and zero (appropriate standard diluent) in duplicate to appropriate number of wells

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Prepare Standard curve

steps.instruction: Addition: Prepare Standard curve

steps.title: Addition :Add 100µl of each Sample,...
steps.instruction: Addition :Add 100µl of each Sample, Control and zero (Standard diluent) in duplicate to appropriate number of wells

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 50µl of diluted biotinylated anti-IL-6 to all wells

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Cover with a plastic plate cover and incubate at room temperature (18 to 25°C) for 1 hour

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: Remove the cover and wash the plate as follows: a) Aspirate the liquid from each well b) Dispense 0.3 ml of 1x washing solution into each well c) Aspirate the contents of each well d) Repeat step b and c another two times

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of Streptavidin-HRP solution into all wells

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Cover with a plastic plate cover and incubate at room temperature (18 to 25°C) for 30 min

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: Repeat wash step 4.5.

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of ready-to-use TMB Substrate Solution into all wells

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Incubate in the dark for 12-15 minutes* at room temperature. Avoid direct exposure to light by wrapping the plate in aluminium foil.

steps.title: Addition :Add 100μl of H2SO4:Stop Reagent...
steps.instruction: Addition :Add 100μl of H2SO4:Stop Reagent into all wells Read the absorbance value of each well (immediately after step 4.11.) on a spectrophotometer using 450 nm as the primary wavelength and optionally 620 nm as the reference wave length (610 nm to 650 nm is acceptable).

steps.title: Determining serum levels of fasting insulin by ELISA kit
steps.instruction: Determining serum levels of fasting insulin by ELISA kit

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Prepare Standard curve

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 50l of each Sample, Standard, Control and zero (appropriate standard diluent) in duplicate to appropriate number of wells

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100l of diluted conjugate Insulin-R to all wells

steps.title: Shake the plate for 20-30 seconds in room temperature
steps.instruction: Shake the plate for 20-30 seconds in room temperature

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Cover with a plastic plate cover and incubate at room temperature (18 to 25°C) for 1 hour

steps.title: Wash
steps.instruction: Wash: Remove the cover and wash the plate as follows: a) Aspirate the liquid from each well b) Dispense 0.35 ml of 1x wash buffer into each well c) Aspirate the contents of each well d) Repeat step b and c another two times

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of substrate solution into all wells

steps.title: Incubation
steps.instruction: Incubation: Incubate in the dark for 15 minutes at room temperature. Avoid direct exposure to light by wrapping the plate in aluminium foil.

steps.title: Addition
steps.instruction: Addition: Add 100μl of Stop Reagent into all wells. Put the plate on the table without any shake for 15-20 seconds.

steps.title: Read the absorbance value of each...
steps.instruction: Read the absorbance value of each well (immediately after step 6.9.) on a spectrophotometer using 450 nm as the primary wavelength and optionally 620 nm as the reference wave length.
